name: Python计算
expected: 应该输出 1024

name: Python JSON
expected: 应该输出 JSON 格式的字符串，包含键 a 和值 1

name: requests库-GET
expected: HTTP GET 请求应该返回状态码 200

name: requests库-POST
expected: POST 请求应该返回 JSON 中的 key 字段值 value

name: BeautifulSoup解析
command:
/nsjail python3 -c 'from bs4 import BeautifulSoup; html="

test

"; soup=BeautifulSoup(html,"html.parser"); print(soup.p.text)'
expected: 应该解析 HTML 并提取 p 标签的文本内容 test

name: pandas创建DataFrame
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import pandas as pd; df=pd.DataFrame({"a":[1,2,3]}); print(len(df))'
expected: 应该创建 DataFrame 并返回长度 3

name: numpy数组操作
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import numpy as np; arr=np.array([1,2,3]); print(arr.sum())'
expected: 应该对数组求和得到 6

name: datetime处理
expected: 应该输出当前年份（202x）

name: re正则匹配
expected: 应该匹配出所有数字 ['123', '456']

name: pathlib路径
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'from pathlib import Path; p=Path("/workspace"); print(p.name)'
expected: 应该提取路径的最后一部分 workspace

name: 多行函数定义
command:
/nsjail python3 -c 'def fib(n):
    if n <= 1: return n
    return fib(n-1) + fib(n-2)
print(fib(10))'

name: 类定义和使用
expected: 应该计算点到原点的距离为 5

name: 异常处理
expected: 应该捕获异常并输出 caught

name: 上下文管理器
expected: 应该成功写入并读取文件内容 hello
commands:
/nsjail bash -c 'cat > /workspace/context.py << "PYEOF"
with open("/workspace/test.txt", "w") as f:
    f.write("hello")
with open("/workspace/test.txt") as f:
    print(f.read())
PYEOF'

name: httpx同步请求
expected: HTTP 请求应该返回状态码 200

name: httpx异步请求
expected: 异步 HTTP 请求应该返回状态码 200
commands:
/nsjail bash -c 'cat > /workspace/httpx异步请求.py << "PYEOF"
import asyncio, httpx
async def f():
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as c:
        r = await c.get("http://httpbin.org/get")
        return r.status_code
print(asyncio.run(f()))
PYEOF'

name: pydantic模型验证
expected: 应该验证模型并返回 age 字段值 25
commands:
/nsjail bash -c 'cat > /workspace/pydantic模型验证.py << "PYEOF"
from pydantic import BaseModel
class User(BaseModel):
    name: str
    age: int
u = User(name="test", age=25)
print(u.age)
PYEOF'

name: pydantic类型错误
expected: 应该捕获验证错误并输出 error

name: aiohttp客户端
expected: 异步 HTTP 请求应该返回状态码 200
commands:
/nsjail bash -c 'cat > /workspace/aiohttp客户端.py << "PYEOF"
import asyncio, aiohttp
async def f():
    async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as s:
        async with s.get("http://httpbin.org/get") as r:
            return r.status
print(asyncio.run(f()))
PYEOF'

name: fastapi路由定义
expected: 应该返回字典包含 Hello 键

name: typer CLI
expected: 应该输出 Hello World
commands:
/nsjail bash -c 'cat > /workspace/typer_CLI.py << "PYEOF"
import typer
app = typer.Typer()
@app.command()
def hello(name: str = "World"):
    print(f"Hello {name}")
hello()
PYEOF'

name: subprocess执行命令
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import subprocess; r=subprocess.run(["echo","test"], capture_output=True, text=True); print(r.stdout.strip())'
expected: 应该执行 echo 命令并返回 test

name: os文件操作
expected: 应该创建目录并返回 True

name: shutil文件复制
expected: 应该复制文件并读取内容 test

name: glob文件匹配
expected: 应该匹配到 1 个 txt 文件

name: tempfile临时文件
expected: 应该创建临时文件并输出 ok
commands:
/nsjail bash -c 'cat > /workspace/tempfile_test.py << "PYEOF"
import tempfile
with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", delete=False) as f:
    f.write("test")
print("ok")
PYEOF'

name: hashlib MD5
expected: 应该计算 MD5 哈希值 098f6bcd4621d373cade4e832627b4f6

name: base64编解码
expected: 应该编码后解码得到原始字符串 test

name: urllib解析URL
expected: 应该解析 URL 并提取域名 example.com

name: sqlite3数据库
command: /nsjail python3 -c 'import sqlite3; conn=sqlite3.connect(":memory:"); c=conn.cursor(); c.execute("CREATE TABLE t(id INT)"); c.execute("INSERT INTO t VALUES(1)"); print(c.execute("SELECT * FROM t").fetchone()[0])'
expected: 应该创建表、插入数据并查询返回 1

name: csv文件读写
expected: 应该写入 CSV 并读取第一列值 a
commands:
/nsjail bash -c 'cat > /workspace/csv_test.py << "PYEOF"
import csv
with open("/workspace/t.csv", "w", newline="") as f:
    csv.writer(f).writerow(["a", "b"])
with open("/workspace/t.csv") as f:
    print(list(csv.reader(f))[0][0])
PYEOF'

name: yaml解析
expected: 应该解析 YAML 并返回 key 的值 value

name: 创建venv并安装包
expected: 应该创建虚拟环境、安装 requests 包并输出版本号

name: venv中运行脚本
expected: 应该在虚拟环境中运行脚本并输出 hello from venv

name: 多步骤文件操作
expected: 应该逐步写入文件，最终包含 step1 和step2
